integration_validation_v2.gap: Proof is an in-memory struct validation only; never touches PG/EventLedger/ArtifactStore despite proof_target 'runtime proof vs PostgreSQL/EventLedger'. No standalone diff-request schema; threshold/metadata only appear as embedded fields of an in-memory loop projection with stringly-typed 'artifact://' refs that are never persisted or read.
integration_validation_v2.evidence: src/kernel/visual_debugging_loop.rs:28-47 VisualDebuggingThresholdConfigV1 / VisualDebugEvidenceArtifactV1 (plain structs); tests/kernel_visual_debugging_loop_tests.rs:11-72 build literals and assert on validate/project return values; no managed-resource access anywhere in the test.

integration_validation_v3.evidence: Production AtelierStore visual-diff API in src/kernel/visual_diff_baseline.rs - record_visual_diff_baseline (sqlx INSERT + EventLedger mirror), get/latest baseline, record_visual_diff_request (standalone diff-request schema with VisualDiffReference Baseline-or-PreviousScreenshot enum, threshold_config + metadata). Migration 0124. Proof tests/atelier_visual_diff_baseline_tests.rs on managed PG: content hashes computed from real payload bytes, full-fidelity PG re-read, latest-baseline tracking, BASELINE_RECORDED event; threshold+metadata round-trip for both reference kinds, REQUEST_RECORDED event with threshold fields; unknown baseline/zero threshold/non-portable refs fail typed leaving zero rows. V2 gaps (no standalone schema, stringly refs, no PG touch) all closed.
integration_validation_v3.gap: artifact:// refs are validated portable tokens persisted/re-read in PG; proof does not materialize payloads through ArtifactStore - contract-compliant (proof_target names PG+EventLedger only).
integration_validation_v3.basis: v3 adversarial per-MT review of remediated deliverable + runtime proof via full-crate managed-PG sweep and kernel-builder fresh-DB proof logs

minimum_controls: Use contract-first identity and preserve projection hash.
risks: Imported MT contract may under-capture prose-only review or proof instructions.

acceptance_criteria: MT-155 [Model-Workflow-Diagnostics] Visual Diff Baseline Contract -- Preserve baseline-or-previous screenshot comparison via diff request schema with threshold and metadata.
proof_targets: cargo test --test atelier_visual_diff_baseline_tests (managed PostgreSQL + EventLedger; persisted visual-diff baselines re-read)
scope.risk_if_missed: CKC parity loss for Visual Diff Baseline Contract
scope.summary: MT-155 [Model-Workflow-Diagnostics] Visual Diff Baseline Contract -- Preserve baseline-or-previous screenshot comparison via diff request schema with threshold and metadata.
